title: VaniX
body:
### **VaniX**

**Just another vanilla friendly modpack.**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MA34zqFN4J8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Step into the world of VaniX, a meticulously crafted modpack designed to elevate your vanilla Minecraft experience while staying true to its original charm. Perfect for players who love the simplicity of vanilla but crave a touch of refinement, VaniX doesn’t add new blocks or items but focuses on enhancing the core gameplay you already love.

**_Key Features:_**
- Stunning Visuals: With carefully selected shaders and resource packs, VaniX transforms your world into a breathtaking winter wonderland. Enjoy dynamic lighting, realistic water, and subtle environmental improvements that bring your builds to life.
- Immersive Gameplay Enhancements: Experience smooth animations, quality-of-life tweaks, and seamless optimizations that make the game more enjoyable without changing its core mechanics.
- Optimized for Performance: Designed to run efficiently, VaniX ensures a smooth experience on most systems without compromising visual or gameplay quality.

**_I would also reccomend dedicating more memory ram in the settings somewhere around 6000mb to 8000mb._**


**_Shaders:_**
- Bliss
- Complementary Unbound
- Complementary Reimagined
- Solas v2

**_Resource Packs:_**
_Main-_
- Faithful 64x
- Realiscraft
_Addons-_
- Colourful containers
- Qcrafty's Capitilzed Font
- Better leaves
- Extended Illumnia
- Better boats
- Animated Items
- Watch of undying
- Vervada's enchanted plants
- Mace3D
- Fresh animations
- FA+ALL Extensions
- Fancy crops
- Expressive Fresh Moves
Link to animate your eyes for expressive fresh moves resource pack:
[Animated Eyes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uEyeM7gB8NQ)

**_Mods:_**

_GUI Mods-_
- Better F3
- Blur
- Highlighter
- Invmove
- Jade
- JustZoom
- Legendary tool tips
- Mod menu
- Pickup Notifier
- Shoulder Surfing
- Status effect bars
- Tiny item animation

_Visual mods_

- Iris shaders
- Camera Overhaul
- Cave dust
- Easy Magic
- Easy Anvils
- Visual workbench
- Easy Shulker boxes
- Enhanced Visuals
- Falling leaves
- First person model
- Glore
- Not enough animations
- Particular
- Physics mod
- Replay mod
- Vanilla refresh
- Visuality

_Sound mods_

- Ambient sounds
- Sounds
- Sound physics remastered
- presence footsteps

_World generation mods_
 
- Terralith
- Tectonic
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Philips ruins
- Unwrecked Ships

_Gameplay mods_

- Actual fishing
- Antique Atlas
- Better farming right click
- Better than mending
- Connectible chains
- Diagonal fences
- Customizable Elytras
- Do a barrel roll
- Easy elytra takeoff
- Lootr
- Text formating everywhere
- Tree harvester

**Whether you're a survivalist, builder, or adventurer, VaniX is the perfect way to rediscover the magic of vanilla Minecraft. Download it now and see how it feels to play Minecraft your way—enhanced, yet familiar.**


**_My socials:_** [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@JbuildsGaming)    [Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@jbuilds?lang=en)
